name: HeyGen Video with Smart Content-Matched Overlays

parameters.content:
## Smart Content-Matched Video Overlays

This workflow automatically generates overlays based on the script content:

**Features:**
- Analyzes script with AI to extract key points
- Auto-generates text overlays for important topics
- Creates lower thirds for speaker introductions
- Adds bullet point overlays for lists
- Generates call-to-action overlays
- Supports custom branding/logos

**Input Options:**
- script: The text content for the video
- branding: Logo URL, colors, font preferences
- overlay_style: minimal, professional, bold
- auto_captions: true/false
